prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-GUNSMITH-GC26GP Product Type: GUN_CLEANING_KIT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 26pc Gunsmith Maintenance Firearm Cleaning Kit Description: This gunsmithing kit is essential for your cleaning and maintenance needs. There is a 2-sided brass and nylon hammer along with 14 various sized brass, nylon, and steel punches. This kit is made from only the highest of quality materials. The product comes in a hard case to ensure optimal organization to prevent the loss of the tools. Chrome plated steel hammer has nylon and brass heads to provide strong, but non-marring contact while in use. With a wide variety of punches and the two-sided hammer; this kit brings versatility and practicality to your firearm maintenance for precision adjustments.

This kit makes an excellent tool for driving pins, drifting sights, at the shooting range or on your workbench. Give it as a gift for the gun or rifle enthusiast in your life on Christmas, Valentines Day, Stocking Stuffer, Easter, Fathers Day, or Birthdays.

This gunsmithing kit includes:
-Brass punches: 1/16”, 3/32”, 1/8”, 9/64”, 5/32”, 3/16”, 7/32”, 1/4”, 9/32”, 5/16”
-Nylon punches: 15/64”, 3/8”
-Steel punches: 1/16”, 3/32” Search Terms: craftsmen everyday users hobbyists repairmen gun enthusiast Features: - NON-MARRING - Chrome plated steel hammer has nylon and brass heads to ensure strong, but non-marring contact while in use. - EVERYTHING YOU NEED - Features 14 punches total with various sizes brass, steel and nylon solid punches making it the ideal kit for your workbench or tool box. - ORGANIZATION CASE - Comes with a convenient plastic molded storage case that is perfect for keeping your tools organized and in one place. - MULIT-USE - The gunsmithing kit is great for craftsmen, everyday users, hobbyists, and repairmen. - GREAT GIFT - Christmas, Valentines Day, Stocking Stuffer, Easter, Fathers Day, or Birthdays. === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 26pc Gunsmith Maintenance Firearm Cleaning Kit

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 26-pc Gunsmith Maintenance Firearm Cleaning Kit

anthropic.title_differentiation: 14 Punches, 2-Sided Hammer, Non-Marring, Hard Storage Case, Gun Enthusiasts

openai.title_differentiation: Non-Marring Brass And Nylon Hammer, 14 Punch Sizes, Hard Storage Case, Pin Driving, Sight Adjustment
